final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original macro nature illustration for a mobile wallpaper, featuring a close-up of a water droplet in a micro-world (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a macro photography / hyper-detailed illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be portrait/vertical framing; must include a single water droplet as the central focal subject with a reflected scene inside; background must render as soft circular bokeh (圆形光斑)
Subject: must include a single large water droplet with a reflected miniature world visible inside; surrounding grass blades and smaller dew drops
Scene/backdrop: must include grass blades and dew drops surrounding the central droplet; background blurred into soft circular bokeh
Lighting/mood: needs a delicate, magical natural-world atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, natural green-and-translucent direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of water surface tension, glass-like translucency, and fine grass texture — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be vertical/portrait orientation suitable for mobile wallpaper; bokeh background must appear as distinct circular light orbs (圆形光斑)
Avoid: must avoid cluttered composition; must avoid any artificial or urban elements
